title: Item Caster
description: Add-on MythicMobs for Casting Skill with Item.
body:
[![SpigotMc](https://img.shields.io/badge/spigot-ED8106?style=for-the-badge&logo=SpigotMC&logoColor=white)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/item-caster.121386/) [![Builtbybit](https://img.shields.io/badge/builtbybit-2D87C3?style=for-the-badge&logo=builtbybit&logoColor=white)](https://builtbybit.com/resources/item-caster.56752/)

> **INFORMATION**
> _This plugin is not that really well made but will develop new feature for future. you can join my server for sneak peek the new feature._

## What is this Plugin?

This plugin is a free alternative for MythicCrucible and MMOItems.

## How to install

1. Downloads MythicMobs and NBTAPI because those 2 plugin is required for enable ItemCaster.
2. Upload that plugin to `plugins/`.
3. Run the Server.

## Features

1. Casting Mythicmobs skill Using Item
2. Support Datapack Usage because how this plugin work is Item nbt as ability data.
3. More Custom MythicMobs Condition.
4. More Custom Mythicmobs Mechanic
5. Add new Configuration item in Mythicmobs.

## Usage Example

This is skill that uses this plugin for casting the item.
